posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have boards for:

  • Customers
  • Properties
  • Faults

Every time I create a new customer in the customer board, I also create assets related to the customer in the assets panel.

In the fault panel, when there is a fault in one of the client’s properties, I create an Item and fill the columns with data, one of the column i want to fill is the client from a dropdown column. Then, in another column, I can select one of the client’s properties from a dropdown. Is it possible to create this?

Thanks.
